post_text: سيبو عيالكم يتحملو المسؤولية شوية وبلاش شغل الماميز ده، حضرتك شفتي الامتحان او ذاكرتي الماده عشان تعرفي الدكتور بيظلم الطلاب ولا لأ؟ ولا هو لو ابني يتهرب من مسؤوليته وببسقط فنلبسها في الدكتور؟ انا طالب وبقول لحضرتك ان دايما فيه ناس عايشه دور الضحيه حتي في اسهل امتحان بخشه وانتم بكلامكم واسلوبكم ده بتشجعو ولادكم انهم يحسو فعلاً ان العيب مش عليهم. ومن ناحيه الفلوس فلو الجامعه همها الفلوس مكنتش خلت كلية كامله زي حاسبات نصهم منحه 100% و GPA 4
translated_text:
Your kids should take responsibility a bit and stop making excuses, did you see the exam or review the material so you know if the professor is cheating the students or not? Or is it that if my son avoids his responsibilities and just blames the professor, I'll dress him up as a victim? I'm a student and I'm telling you that there are always people who act like victims even in the easiest exam, and your words and behavior encourage them to think that the fault is not theirs. From a financial perspective, if the university is only concerned with money, they wouldn't have created a whole college like computer science where 100% of the students receive a full scholarship and a GPA of 4.

[Comments: Your kids should take responsibility a bit and stop making excuses, did you see the exam or review the material so you know if the professor is cheating the students or not? | My son, you should know that if he gets into trouble, he'll have to face it, and if he's facing a problem in his studies, it's better for him to solve it honestly rather than lying and avoiding it | I_studied_calc3 This is the worst comment I've ever seen, can someone please see it literally? We're being screwed over by this university trash and they're also dropping us, so no more jokes]
signal: Students and parents are not taking responsibility for their actions and are blaming professors for their own failures.
